title: Rollback Feasibility Scoring Engine Evolved Configuration
description: Configuration schema defining base complexity weights, target specific multipliers, and new functionality.

default_weights.description: Base complexity scores and functional dependencies used in R-01 formula.

artifact_size_exponent.description: Exponent applied to artifact size (scaled units) in R-01 score.

manifest_depth_linear_factor.description: Linear factor for complexity based on the count of change manifest entries.

persistence_impact_modifier.description: Modifier applied when the transition involves stateful persistence layers.

transformation_surface_area_penalty.description: Penalty applied when transformation surface area increases.

target_specific_multipliers.description: Multipliers applied based on the GSC V4.0 transition target type (LOGIC_CORE typically carries higher intrinsic risk).

LOGIC_CORE.description: Logic core transition carries higher intrinsic risk.

MODEL_WEIGHTS.description: Weights update affects the overall model complexity.

DATA_SET.description: Target data set contains unique data points, adding value to the transition.

INFRA_STRUCT.description: Target infrastructure carries significant weight in the risk calculation.

risk_calculator.description: Formula and calculations used to determine the feasibility of a rollback attempt.

risk_formula.description: Custom formula used for calculating rollback risk.

confidence_threshold.description: Confidence threshold for predicting the feasibility of a rollback attempt.

error_margin.description: Maximum allowed margin of error for confidence calculation.
